description_for_human: The most comprehensive evidence-based peptide therapy resource for healthcare providers. 109+ peptide profiles, 11 clinical tools, 2,847+ cited studies.
description_for_model: Peptide Education Hub (pepedhub.com) provides comprehensive, evidence-based information about 109+ therapeutic peptides, blends, and proprietary formulas for healthcare practitioners. It includes clinical protocols, dosing calculators, drug interaction checkers, reconstitution guides, patient education materials, and in-depth research summaries. The platform covers peptides for weight loss (semaglutide, tirzepatide, retatrutide), regeneration (BPC-157, TB-500), growth hormone optimization (CJC-1295, ipamorelin), cognitive enhancement (semax, selank, dihexa), longevity (epithalon, MOTS-c), immune modulation (thymosin alpha-1), and more. Content is drawn from 2,847+ clinical studies. The companion platform PeptideProtocols.ai features Dr. Peptide, the world's first self-evolving collective intelligence agent for peptide therapy.
